where.if: and (u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
select u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.created_at as createdAt, count(s.id) as submissionCount, sum(case when s.judge_status = 'ACCEPTED' then 1 else 0 end) as acceptedCount from users u left join submissions s on s.user_id = u.id
group by u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.created_at order by u.created_at desc, u.id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update users set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{userId}
